description: Production-ready service scaffolding for remaining 6 apps (QuantSync, QuantAds, QuantTube, QuantNeon, QuantEdits, QuantMax). Each gets a Fastify backend with core CRUD services, routes, and tests using the established patterns.
steps: Create apps/quantsync/backend/app.ts, services/post.service.ts (Post CRUD wrapping PostRepository - create, get, list, update, delete, like, repost), services/feed.service.ts (feed ranking - getFeed with chronological+engagement scoring, getExploreFeed, getTrending), services/community.service.ts (create, join, leave, listMembers, updateSettings). Routes: routes/posts.ts, routes/feed.ts, routes/communities.ts.
Create apps/quantsync/backend/__tests__/post.service.test.ts: Tests for post CRUD - create post, like increments count, delete soft-deletes, list by user returns paginated.

Create apps/quantads/backend/app.ts, services/campaign.service.ts (Campaign CRUD - create, update, activate, pause, delete, getStats), services/ad-serving.service.ts (serveAd for user targeting - selectAd based on targeting JSON, recordImpression, recordClick), services/analytics.service.ts (getCampaignMetrics, getDailyReport). Routes: routes/campaigns.ts, routes/serving.ts, routes/analytics.ts.
Create apps/quantads/backend/__tests__/campaign.service.test.ts: Tests for campaign lifecycle - create draft, activate campaign, pause, getStats aggregates impressions/clicks.

Create apps/quantube/backend/app.ts, services/video.service.ts (Video metadata CRUD - upload metadata, get, list, update, delete, incrementView), services/channel.service.ts (create channel, get, update, subscribe, getSubscribers), services/history.service.ts (addToHistory, getWatchHistory, clearHistory). Routes: routes/videos.ts, routes/channels.ts, routes/history.ts.
Create apps/quantube/backend/__tests__/video.service.test.ts: Tests for video CRUD - create with processing status, incrementView updates count, list by channel returns paginated.

Create apps/quantneon/backend/app.ts, services/photo.service.ts (Photo CRUD - upload metadata, get, list, delete, like), services/story.service.ts (create story with expiry, get active stories, view story, expire stories), services/filter.service.ts (list available filters, get filter metadata, apply filter record). Routes: routes/photos.ts, routes/stories.ts, routes/filters.ts.
Create apps/quantneon/backend/__tests__/photo.service.test.ts: Tests for photo CRUD, story expiry logic.

Create apps/quantedits/backend/app.ts, services/project.service.ts (Project CRUD - create, get, list, update, delete, duplicate), services/asset.service.ts (upload asset metadata, list project assets, delete asset, generateUploadUrl), services/export.service.ts (queueExport with format/resolution, getExportStatus, listExports). Routes: routes/projects.ts, routes/assets.ts, routes/exports.ts.
Create apps/quantedits/backend/__tests__/project.service.test.ts: Tests for project CRUD, export job queuing.

Create apps/quantmax/backend/app.ts, services/profile.service.ts (DatingProfile CRUD - create, get, update, deactivate, getProfileScore), services/matching.service.ts (matching algorithm - getMatches, calculateCompatibility based on interests/location/preferences, getPotentialMatches), services/swipe.service.ts (swipe, checkMatch - if mutual right swipe create match, getSwipeHistory). Routes: routes/profiles.ts, routes/matching.ts, routes/swipes.ts.
Create apps/quantmax/backend/__tests__/matching.service.test.ts: Tests for matching - mutual swipe creates match, compatibility scoring, getPotentialMatches filters by preferences.
Update package.json for all 6 apps: add @quant/server-core, fastify, zod, ioredis dependencies and test script. Update tsconfig.json to include backend/**/*.ts.
Verify all 6 apps typecheck and tests pass individually
acceptance_criteria: Each of the 6 apps has a working Fastify app.ts with route registration
Each app has at least one service with proper CRUD operations backed by Prisma mocks
Each app has at least one test file with passing tests
All TypeScript compiles cleanly for all 6 apps
All new tests pass when run with vitest
verification: unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx vitest run apps/quantsync/backend/ apps/quantads/backend/ apps/quantube/backend/ apps/quantneon/backend/ apps/quantedits/backend/ apps/quantmax/backend/
findings: All 72 tests pass across 6 test files. TypeScript compiles cleanly for backend/ in all 6 apps (pre-existing errors in api/ and src/ TSX files are unrelated). Used local PrismaClient type placeholder (type.ts) to avoid @prisma/client module resolution issues in the pnpm monorepo - the actual PrismaClient is injected at runtime via constructor. Prettier reformatted files via lint-staged hook. The tsconfigs match quantchat pattern exactly (extends root, jsx: react-jsx, references to all packages).
